segments.text: Stop doing crunches to lose belly fat, seriously.
It's a total waste of time.
Your belly fat isn't stubborn, your strategy is just wrong.
Here are the only two methods that actually work.
No detox teas, no scams.
Method one, the math.
You cannot out-train a bad diet.
Like, it's literally impossible.
If you're not in a calorie deficit,
that belly isn't going anywhere, period.
Eat high protein, stay in a deficit,
and be patient with it.
The math always wins, every single time.
Method two, the cheat code, walking.
It's hands down the most underrated fat burner
on the planet.
10,000 steps a day burns roughly 1,700 calories a week.
That's pure fat loss without destroying yourself
on a treadmill or doing some insane cardio session.
Just walk, that's it.
It's not magic, it's literally just physics.
Do this for 30 days,
and I promise your reflection will thank you.

fullText: Stop doing crunches to lose belly fat, seriously. It's a total waste of time. Your belly fat isn't stubborn, your strategy is just wrong. Here are the only two methods that actually work. No detox teas, no scams. Method one, the math. You cannot out-train a bad diet. Like, it's literally impossible. If you're not in a calorie deficit, that belly isn't going anywhere, period. Eat high protein, stay in a deficit, and be patient with it. The math always wins, every single time. Method two, the cheat code, walking. It's hands down the most underrated fat burner on the planet. 10,000 steps a day burns roughly 1,700 calories a week. That's pure fat loss without destroying yourself on a treadmill or doing some insane cardio session. Just walk, that's it. It's not magic, it's literally just physics. Do this for 30 days, and I promise your reflection will thank you.
